suite.name: Test

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)

Unable to obtain driver using Selenium Manager: Selenium Manager failed for: C:\Python313\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\common\windows\selenium-manager.exe --browser chrome --output json. The chromedriver version cannot be discovered
Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

SeleniumManagerException: Message: Selenium Manager failed for: C:\Python313\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\common\windows\selenium-manager.exe --browser chrome --output json. The chromedriver version cannot be discovered

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

test.name: TC001 Enter Name

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
